title: Feature Request - Add option for Connections and Config panel display at the same time when unpinned
author: mtorres10
body_snippet:
Add an option so Connections and Config tabs both display at the same time on click when "unpinned".

## Expected Behavior
When Connections and Config tabs are **"unpinned/hidden/collapsed"** add an option that when clicking on either, it will display both tabs. Similar to the behavior when both tabs are **"pinned/visible/uncollapsed"**.

In my humble opinion, is easier to work with remote connections when you have both Connection and Config tabs available at the same time, regardless if is...

comments.author: mtorres10
comments.snippet: There seems to be a similar request, #153, but in this case, the request is to have the panels take the whole screen. In My case I am requesting panels to be split vertically on the left side of the screen, as shown in the recordings

A beta build (v1.81.0-beta.4) including this fix is available from the fork's Releases page.

notes:
AI triage (claude): Confirmed still reproducible on latest nightly 1.78.2 build — panels (Connections + Config) cannot be displayed simultaneously when unpinned, only one shows at a time.
Approach: Modify panel auto-hide/unpin logic to allow both panels to remain visible simultaneously, likely by adjusting the DockPanel or WeifenLuo docking manager so unpinning one panel doesn't force-hide the other.
